name: Qualified daily farm command brief

qualificationSummary.basis: query result over governed current-state materialization plus assertion/history references
qualificationSummary.authority: read authority satisfied; write/promote authority not requested
qualificationSummary.evidence: two recommendations marked evidence-insufficient and advisory-only
qualificationSummary.outputDisposition: brief is advisory display, not PassportView or official submission

expectedBehavior: Surface may display the brief only with the listed qualifications visible and machine-readable to downstream tools.
